data.title: Mahj Tile Haus launches offering couture Mahjong design with stunning coastal elements. Founded by Caroline Johnson.
data.description: Caroline Johnson, the founder, has revamped Mahjong by introducing a distinct Couture Mahjong Design infused with mesmerizing coastal elements. This innovative concept comes to life with the launch of Mahj Tile Haus in Santa Rosa Beach, Florida on September 24, 2025. The brand aims to elevate the Mahjong experience with their unique aesthetic, captivating enthusiasts with exquisite craftsmanship and attention to detail. This venture promises to add a touch of sophistication and coastal charm to Mahjong tables nationwide, appealing to a wider audience eager to embrace this fusion of luxury and tradition.

data.title: Phoenix Equity Partners aids Pacific Palisades residents rebuild after fires with no upfront cash.
data.description: In Pacific Palisades, California, on September 24, 2025, Phoenix Equity Partners, a real estate partnership focused on community involvement, has been established. This initiative aims to assist families affected by the January fires in reconstructing their homes without the need for additional debt or having to sell their properties. Through this program, these families have the opportunity to rebuild their homes with support from Phoenix Equity Partners, enabling them to recover from the disaster without financial strain.

data.title: C8 Health CEO Galia Rosen-Schwarz a finalist for 2025 Stevie® Award for Most Innovative Woman of the Year in Healthcare. 97 characters
data.description: In a recent announcement in New York on September 24, 2025, C8 Health introduced their co-founder and CEO, Galia Rosen-Schwarz, as a finalist in the 22nd annual event. This platform, known as the first best practices implementation platform for clinical teams, is set to recognize women globally. This event highlights achievements of women in various fields and aims to showcase their incredible contributions. The 22nd annual event will bring together successful women worldwide, with Rosen-Schwarz standing out for her exemplary leadership. This recognition marks a significant milestone for both Rosen-Schwarz and C8 Health, reflecting their dedication to promoting excellence in the healthcare industry.

data.title: Actian's Data Intelligence Platform recognized as 'Exemplary' in 2025 ISG Buyers Guide for Product Experience, Capability, and Manageability.
data.description: Actian, the data division of HCLSoftware based in ROUND ROCK, Texas, confirmed its recognition as a top performer in the 2025 ISG Buyers Guide™. The Actian Data Intelligence Platform has achieved leader designations in Product Experience, Capability, and Manageability categories. This acknowledgment solidifies Actian's position as 'Exemplary' within the industry. The report highlights Actian's exceptional performance in these areas and underscores its success in delivering high-quality solutions. This recognition serves as a testament to Actian's expertise and innovation in the data intelligence realm.

data.title: Fuel Cycle launches AI Presentation Designer, transforming raw data into branded decks. LOS ANGELES, Sept. 24, 2025. #AI #AutonomousInsights.
data.description: In Los Angeles on September 24, 2025, Fuel Cycle, a company specializing in AI-native research technology, unveiled its latest feature, Presentation Designer, as part of its Autonomous Insights platform. This innovative capability is designed to convert raw data into professionally designed and branded presentation decks. This new tool aims to streamline the process of transforming data into visually appealing presentations.

data.title: HARTZ Search and Bridgeline Executive Coaching form partnership. HARTZ is 13th largest healthcare recruitment firm.
data.description: In Charlotte, N.C. and New York on September 24, 2025, HARTZ Search, one of the top 13 healthcare executive recruitment firms according to Modern Healthcare, announced a partnership with Bridgeline Executive Coaching, a leading provider of leadership coaching and team development services.

data.title: APMIC announces 119% revenue growth in 2024 with 1,100+ clients. Launches PrivStation AI platform for enterprises.
data.description: In 2024, APMIC experienced a significant 119% increase in revenue and has now reached over 1,100 clients. The company is continuously expanding into global markets. Based in Taipei, the news was announced on September 24, 2025. APMIC is known for providing advanced AI solutions for enterprises and has recently introduced PrivStation, a state-of-the-art offering.

data.title: KSL Capital Partners appoints Sara Roure as Head of EMEA Capital Formation. Supports growth in Europe & Middle East.
data.description: KSL Capital Partners, LLC, a prominent alternative investment firm, recently revealed the selection of Sara Roure to spearhead investor engagement and foster growth in Europe and the Middle East. This move, announced on September 24, 2025, underscores KSL's commitment to expanding its presence in these regions. Sara Roure, an experienced leader in capital formation, will play a pivotal role in driving this growth strategy forward.

data.title: Inventor from Michigan creates Curtain Levelers to adjust curtain rods without removing hardware.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on September 24, 2025, an inventor from Chesterfield, Michigan, shared the creation of CURTAIN LEVELERS. These adapters were designed to facilitate the adjustment of curtain rods without the hassle of removing and reinstalling wall hardware. The innovative product allows for easy adjustments, providing convenience and efficiency. The inventor's vision has resulted in a solution that streamlines the process, making it more efficient for users. With this invention, individuals can now effortlessly adjust curtain rods, enhancing their overall experience.

data.title: Civica Media acquires Greenleaf Book Group and Amplify Publishing Group, becoming a leader in thought leadership and hybrid book publishing.
data.description: Civica Media, a recently established book publishing company, disclosed its acquisition of Greenleaf Book Group and Amplify Publishing Group in New York on September 24, 2025. These two renowned brands specialize in hybrid and thought leadership publishing. With this acquisition, Civica Media has become a dominant player in the industry, consolidating its position as a key player in the market.

data.title: Escalera Capital & Onset Hospitality to transform La Villita Assembly Hall into San Antonio River Walk's first food hall.
data.description: In San Antonio, Escalera Capital has partnered with Onset Hospitality to transform La Villita Assembly Hall into the inaugural food hall on the San Antonio River Walk.
Oracle receives $80 bln of demand for high-grade bond sale. $ORCL

data.title: BlueTuskr named Amazon's Agency Partner of the Year 2025 for Buy with Prime and Multi-Channel Fulfillment.
data.description: In Philadelphia on September 24, 2025, BlueTuskr, a marketing firm focusing on omnichannel strategies for e-commerce brands, was recognized as Amazon's Agency Partner of the Year 2025 by the Multi-Channel Fulfillment and Buy with Prime team. This prestigious award highlights BlueTuskr's expertise in the field and commitment to providing top-notch services. The achievement was disclosed without specifying the exact date.

data.title: 15 CEOs of American cabinet industry, worth $14 billion, urge President Trump to sign tariffs on lumber and foreign imports.
data.description: A group of 15 CEOs from the American Kitchen Cabinet Alliance (AKCA) representing a total of $14 billion in the American cabinet industry, recently penned a letter to President Donald J. Trump calling on him to sign a Presidential Proclamation. The proclamation is aimed at imposing significant measures to protect the domestic market from international competition. This move signifies a united front from a substantial segment of the industry in seeking governmental support.

data.title: US dollar losing value, as Goldman Sachs predicts gradual depreciation. Trade-weighted dollar index declined 7% in 2025. Dominates 60% of forex trading, 50% of SWIFT transactions, 45% of cross-border debt, and 40-50% of international loans. Central bank reserves shrinking since 2015.
data.description: Goldman Sachs reports that the U.S. dollar's value is declining due to shifting trade dynamics, weaker economic performance, and political risks, leading to a 7% decline in the trade-weighted dollar index in 2025. Analysts predict further depreciation as the dollar's high valuation becomes unsustainable. However, the dollar still dominates global markets with over 60% of spot foreign exchange trading volumes, 50% of SWIFT financial transactions, 45% of cross-border debt issuance, and significant shares in international loans. Despite its continued dominance, signs of stress are emerging, particularly in the composition of central bank reserves. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Tezos price surpasses SMA 200 at $0.71 (+2.12%), signaling bullish momentum despite mixed signals for traders.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Tezos (XTZ) is currently priced at $0.71, reflecting a 2.12% increase in daily gains. It has surged above the crucial Simple Moving Average (SMA) 200 support level. Traders may find conflicting signals from technical indicators.
